title: Senior Business Development Manager at Godrej Properties Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Godrej Properties Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties Advisory Limited:
Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
